body: "HMPPS action plans and response letters published following the HMIP inspection of North East Probation Service.  This includes:  An overall report on the inspection of Probation Services in the North East region – HM Inspectorate of Probation - published October 2025.  An inspection of probation services in County Durham and Darlington PDU - published August 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Redcar, Cleveland and Middlesbrough PDU - published August 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Stockton and Hartlepool PDU - published July 2025.  An inspection of probation services in North Tyneside and Northumberland PDU - published July 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Sunderland PDU - published July 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Gateshead and South Tyneside PDU - published July 2025.  An inspection of probation services in Newcastle Upon Tyne PDU - published July 2025. "
